title: Easy Baryonyx Coloring Page
seoTitle: Easy Baryonyx Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Color a simple cartoon Baryonyx dinosaur. Perfect for kids who love prehistoric life. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Baryonyx was a fish-eating theropod dinosaur that lived during the Early Cretaceous period in what is now Europe.
It had a long, crocodile-like snout and a massive 12-inch (31 cm) curved claw on its first finger, perfect for catching fish.
Its name means 'heavy claw', referencing the massive thumb spikes it used to spear prey in swampy waters.
